meaning: n.杏仁岩adj.杏仁状的,似杏仁岩的
examples: Arrhythmia could be elicited by electrical stimulation of amygdaloid complex.
The anti-motilin serum partly abolished the effects of motilin in the amygdaloid nucleus on MMC.
Conclusion: Auditory cortex receives the neural projection from the ipsilateral amygdaloid nucleus in rats.
